texts.label: text
texts.orig: Developing and deploying technology to enable sustainability
texts.text: Developing and deploying technology to enable sustainability

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Calibrate performance with actual flue gas
texts.text: Calibrate performance with actual flue gas

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 'After several weeks of running the test facility and completion of the preliminary test phase, the results are extremely positive. "We can observe a good separation rate and comparatively high purities. We are pleased with the very promising results of the first test phase," says Holcim Plant Manager Stephan Hinrichs. "I am very proud that we are one of the first cement plants in the world to gain really practical experience with CO 2 capture.'
texts.text: 'After several weeks of running the test facility and completion of the preliminary test phase, the results are extremely positive. "We can observe a good separation rate and comparatively high purities. We are pleased with the very promising results of the first test phase," says Holcim Plant Manager Stephan Hinrichs. "I am very proud that we are one of the first cement plants in the world to gain really practical experience with CO 2 capture.'

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · PolyActive™ technology works well for CO 2 removal from cement plant flue gas - even at intermittent conditions
texts.text: PolyActive™ technology works well for CO 2 removal from cement plant flue gas - even at intermittent conditions

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · New prototype membrane envelope module performed well
texts.text: New prototype membrane envelope module performed well

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Pre-treatment was effective in protecting the membrane
texts.text: Pre-treatment was effective in protecting the membrane

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Computer modelling closely correlated with actual performance
texts.text: Computer modelling closely correlated with actual performance

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · No deterioration in membrane performance over the test (that cannot be explained by analysis - see below)
texts.text: No deterioration in membrane performance over the test (that cannot be explained by analysis - see below)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · No change is required to the computer modelling for the design of Phase 2a and future phases
texts.text: No change is required to the computer modelling for the design of Phase 2a and future phases

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Membrane module showed stable performance and experimental and simulation data in close agreement
texts.text: Membrane module showed stable performance and experimental and simulation data in close agreement

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Correlation decreases slightly over the operating period:
texts.text: Correlation decreases slightly over the operating period:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -This was caused by the increase in ambient temperature (March - May), which resulted in increased water content in the feed to the membrane unit - the simulation underestimates the water content in permeate, hence the discrepancy between simulated and observed readings
texts.text: -This was caused by the increase in ambient temperature (March - May), which resulted in increased water content in the feed to the membrane unit - the simulation underestimates the water content in permeate, hence the discrepancy between simulated and observed readings

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -CPT's process design includes water vapour removal - so this will not be a problem in future phases
texts.text: -CPT's process design includes water vapour removal - so this will not be a problem in future phases

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Pre/post testing of the membrane module at Hereon's lab using synthetic CO 2 /N 2 /H 2 O mixture shows no degradation
texts.text: Pre/post testing of the membrane module at Hereon's lab using synthetic CO 2 /N 2 /H 2 O mixture shows no degradation
